data.name: SexSide
data.detailed_description:
You've just gotten a girlfriend for the first time… inside a video game.

One boring day in your room, you decide to try out a new adult VR game — until you realize, once inside, that… you can’t leave anymore.

The first thing you see when you arrive is your new virtual girlfriend, Anne — and she’s willing to do anything, whether dangerous or sexual, to convince you to stay with her. Fearing for your life (and maybe your sanity), you try to escape her by exploring the many zones of SexSide.

Each level is guarded by a different version of Anne, and the only way to escape is by collecting the Master Code. But there’s a catch: you’ll need to fuck every one of these girls first — each with her own personality, but all of them share one thing… they're all twisted versions of Anne, and they all want to fuck you… some even at the same time.

On your escape, you’ll meet:

🦊 Anne (the fox girl) – The original. Jealous, obsessive, and manipulative. She pulls the strings from the shadows, and her only goal is to trap you forever so you never leave her again.

🖤 Anna (the crow girl) – A tsundere, coffee-addicted and constantly tired. Can you make her fall for you, even if she’s too shy to admit it?

🐶 Annie (the dog girl) – Playful, hyper, and always happy. She wants you to put on her leash and take her out for a walk… before she starts licking every inch of your body.

🐰 Aibi (the bunny girl) – Wild, energetic, and shameless. She loves to bounce… right on top of you.

🦌 Hannah (the deer girl) – Sweet, sensitive, and shy. But she’s willing to push past her embarrassment — just to keep you with her… and let you do whatever you want.

Will you fuck them all and escape this world… or will you decide to stay forever?

FEATURES

  • Finally: animations! Some girls feature a special animated scene.

  • Visual Novel++ Format: Each girl has different story arcs that complete her own narrative.

  • No Censorship!: We've removed censorship from the images (we’ll add an option later to censor them as preferred).

  • Gallery: Fill an image album as you progress through the story and revisit the chapters you've completed.

  • Choose the Girl: Decide which girl to pursue as the story unfolds.

  • Flashback: Go back in the story at any time to change a decision or relive a moment.

  • Smooth Navigation: Choose whether text progresses automatically or skip it to reach your favorite part.

  • Immersive Audio: Including music, sound effects, voices, and "other effects." Adjust volume settings independently or mute everything.

PLEASE NOTE

  • All characters depicted and visually represented in this game are over 18 years old, and no real or identifiable minors were used in the production of this game.

  • Help us out! If you think you can improve the narrative in your language, feel free to send us your suggestions via email or message us on our Steam page.

  • We're still working on it: All updates and improvements we develop will be added to the game at no additional cost.

data.short_description: You finally have a girlfriend… inside a video game! But she won’t let you leave. You’re trapped in SexSide, an adult game of alternate versions of your POSSESSIVE virtual girlfriend. Have sex with each one to uncover the hidden story and escape before she traps you—if you really want to leave.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 韓文, 日文, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: WIN XP/Vista/7/8/10/11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 2048 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 Compatible Graphics Card
  • 儲存空間: 2048 MB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: WIN XP/Vista/7/8/10/11
